text:
Once upon a time in a small village surrounded by vast forests, there lived a curious cat named Cleo. Cleo adored exploring. Every day after midnight, she'd sneak out through an old fireplace aperture into the moonlit woods. Sometimes she'd just meow softly to herself, other times she’d listen to the rustle of leaves and birds.

One night, Cleo happened upon a peculiar old tree that whispered stories to all manner of creatures nocturnal. It seemed to speak in dreams. Cleo listened intently. The old tree spoke of a treasure hidden deep beneath a pool in the forest.

Driven by curiosity, Cleo followed the whispers. After countless nights, she found a forgotten path veiled in ivy. Through thickets and under vines, she reached the edge of an enchanted pond. Shadows danced on the water's surface as she cautiously stepped forward.

Then, something unexpected happened. A shimmering light emerged from the water—more luminous than moonbeams.
